steps.title: Substitute x = 2 into the function
steps.content:
To find $f(2)$, replace every instance of $x$ with \$2$ in the expression $f(x) = x^2 + x + 61$:

$$f(2) = (2)^2 + (2) + 61$$

steps.title: Evaluate each term and sum
steps.content:
Simplify the power, then add all terms:

$$f(2) = 4 + 2 + 61 = 67$$
